recommendations.title: Tie Me Up! Tie Me Down!
recommendations.overview: After being released from a mental hospital, a troubled young man tracks down an actress he once had sex with and forces her into captivity, determined to make her part of his life.

recommendations.title: Last Tango in Paris
recommendations.overview: A recently widowed American begins an anonymous sexual relationship with a young Parisian woman.

recommendations.title: From Beginning to End
recommendations.overview: Two brothers develop a very close relationship as they are growing up in an idyllic and happy family. When they are young adults their relationship becomes very intimate, romantic, and sexual.

recommendations.title: Silent Night, Deadly Night Part 2
recommendations.overview: Ricky is released from a mental hospital, taking with him the memory of his brother Billy's death and embarking on a journey of relentless revenge.

recommendations.title: Sling Blade
recommendations.overview: Karl Childers, a mentally disabled man, has been in the custody of the state mental hospital since the age of 12 for killing his mother and her lover. Although thoroughly institutionalized, he is deemed fit to be released into the outside world.

recommendations.title: ¿Quieres ser mi hijo?
recommendations.overview: Lu, a conformist woman in her forties, learns that her 15-year partner has been having extramarital affairs. Starting from scratch, she gets involved in an unexpected relationship with a young womanizer.

recommendations.title: Empire of Light
recommendations.overview: The duty manager of a seaside cinema, who is struggling with her mental health, forms a relationship with a new employee on the south coast of England in the 1980s.

recommendations.title: Fool's Paradise
recommendations.overview: A down-on-his-luck publicist discovers a recently released mental health patient who looks just like a misbehaving movie star. The publicist subs him into a film, creating a new star. But fame and fortune are not all they are cracked up to be.

recommendations.title: Populaire
recommendations.overview: An insurance agent and his new secretary become locked in the grip of romance and competition as they train together for a speed-typing contest.

recommendations.title: The Little Death
recommendations.overview: A comedy film that looks into the loosely connected lives of people with strange sexual fantasies.
